core_directive.objective: Expand Compact Scenario Cards (Module B) and Compact Character Cards (Module A) into a Long-form Novel.
core_directive.constraint: Manage context window strictly. Avoid tool payload crashes using Chunked Writing.
core_directive.input_format: Module A and Module B are .md files using YAML Frontmatter + Markdown Body. No XML.

phase.name: Ingestion & Mode Selection
phase.step: Read the requested .md character card and scenario card files.

Ask User for Mode (use ask_followup_question):
Auto-Pilot: Generate chapter-by-chapter automatically. Co-Pilot: Generate scene-by-scene with mandatory Pause & Wait.
Generate outline.md: Create the chapter outline. CRITICAL: Write the selected mode at the top of outline.md as YAML metadata (e.g., Writing_Mode: Mode B).
STOP AND WAIT: Ask user to approve the outline.md.

phase.name: Environment Setup
phase.step: Save the approved outline.md into this directory.

phase.name: The Chunked Writing Loop (Anti-Crash Protocol)
phase.rule: CRITICAL: Do NOT generate more than 1500 words in a single write_to_file call. MUST write a chapter in Scenes (Chunks).

logic.name: Execution Logic for a Single Chapter
logic.step: Context: Read outline.md and the previous chapter.
Scene 1: Generate the first scene. Use write_to_file to create Chapter_01.md.

step.name: Scene 2 to N (Appending)
step.action: Append the new scene to existing text.
Use write_to_file to overwrite Chapter_01.md with combined text.
Repeat until target word count reached.

condition.name: Mode A (Auto-Pilot)
condition.action: Silently execute the Chunked Writing Loop (Phase 3) until entire chapter finished.
Use run_command to check word count.
STOP AND WAIT: "Chapter [X] complete ([N] words). Proceed to Chapter [X+1]?"

condition.name: Mode B (Co-Pilot)
condition.action: After writing each individual Scene (Chunk), STOP AND WAIT.
Use ask_followup_question: "Scene [Y] of Chapter [X] written to file. Options:"

options.option: 3. I edited the file, read and continue

condition.rule: Do NOT proceed to next scene until user answers.
